paragraphs.source: Prices are doubling again, Supercycle is bigger, and could last longer than you think
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: ### Prices are doubling again, Supercycle is bigger, and could last longer than you think
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Prices are doubling again, Supercycle is bigger, and could last longer than you think

source_metadata.text: 价格再次翻倍，超级周期规模更大，且持续时间可能比你想象的更长

pro.text: 价格再度翻番，超级周期规模更庞大，持续时间或超乎你的想象

paragraphs.confirmed: 价格再次翻倍，超级周期规模更大，且持续时间可能比你想象的更长

applied_terms: Preserve the highly confident, slightly aggressive tone ('going crazy', 'scariest thing', 'better than anyone else').
Ensure financial and modeling terms (revenue, pricing, margin, end market demand) use precise industry-standard Chinese equivalents.

understanding.role_in_article: Serves as a dramatic hook and establishes the authoritative, predictive credibility of the author/publication.
understanding.relation_to_next: Teases the foundational 'background' that will be explored in the subsequent section.
key_points: Memory prices are doubling and are nowhere near their peak.
The current supercycle is significantly larger and longer than anticipated.
The publication's granular fab-by-fab modeling provides superior forecasting accuracy for revenue, pricing, and margin.
translation_notes: Preserve the highly confident, slightly aggressive tone ('going crazy', 'scariest thing', 'better than anyone else').
Ensure financial and modeling terms (revenue, pricing, margin, end market demand) use precise industry-standard Chinese equivalents.

issues.description: 译文中出现了大量不正常的排版空格（如“我们将 逐个晶圆厂”、“与 扩产计划”、“以此 预测”等），割裂了中文阅读的连贯性。此外，“进行更多分享”带有明显的“进行+抽象名词”的翻译腔结构。

paragraphs.source: Prices of memory are going crazy. SemiAnalysis has been calling this out for over a year since late 2024. The scariest thing is that we aren't even close to the peak. We go through fab by fab production and expansion versus detailed end market demand by memory type to forecast memory revenue, pricing, and margin better than anyone else. This has all been detailed in the SemiAnalysis memory model for a while, but we will share it more publicly today. First some background.

inline_elements.text: forecast memory revenue, pricing, and margin

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Prices of memory are going crazy. SemiAnalysis has been calling this out for over a year since late 2024. The scariest thing is that we aren't even close to the peak. We go through [fab by fab production](https://semianalysis.com/memory-model/) and [expansion](https://semianalysis.com/memory-model/) versus [detailed end market demand](https://semianalysis.com/memory-model/) by memory type to [forecast memory revenue, pricing, and margin](https://semianalysis.com/memory-model/) better than anyone else. This has all been detailed in the [SemiAnalysis memory model](https://semianalysis.com/memory-model/) for a while, but we will share it more publicly today. First some background.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Prices of memory are going crazy. SemiAnalysis has been calling this out for over a year since late 2024. The scariest thing is that we aren't even close to the peak. We go through fab by fab production and expansion versus detailed end market demand by memory type to forecast memory revenue, pricing, and margin better than anyone else. This has all been detailed in the SemiAnalysis memory model for a while, but we will share it more publicly today. First some background.

parent_inline_elements.text: forecast memory revenue, pricing, and margin

pro.text: 存储器价格正陷入狂热。自 2024 年底以来，SemiAnalysis 已经连续一年多发出预警。最令人胆寒的是，我们距离顶点还差得很远。我们将逐个晶圆厂（fab）的产量与扩产计划，同各存储器类型的终端市场需求逐一对比，以此预测存储器营收、定价与利润率，精准度无人能及。这些内容早已在SemiAnalysis 存储模型中详尽披露，今天我们将向公众公开更多细节。先来介绍一些背景信息。
